lines.speaker: Miles
lines.text: Thank you, I hope you like your present. I must be leaving now though.

lines.speaker: Miles
lines.text: Sorry, that's just not the right answer!

sections.title: If the player is in a zone where the random event isn't allowed
If Miles is looking for another player

lines.speaker: Miles
lines.text: Sorry, but I'm trying to talk to [other player's display name], but [he/she] seems to be ignoring me.

lines.speaker: Miles
lines.text: Greetings [player name], I need your help.

lines.speaker: Miles
lines.text: I'd like to talk to you, [player name]!

lines.speaker: Miles
lines.text: ehem... Hello [player name], please talk to me!
